title: Equipment+
description: Equipment+ is a mod that adds new armor, weapons, and more to minecraft utilizing fairly unused items (copper, amethyst etc.)
body:
This is a more vanilla+ type mod (it may become less vanilla in future updates) that adds (as of 1.0.2):

copper armor - a cheap iron-like alterative that oxidizes over time

copper tools - simialrly to the armor the tools will perform like iron and oxidize

copper turret - a craftable entity that will attack (some) monsters in a wide range (there are some bugs with it though)

amethyst armor - a new strong armor giving the player effects for each piece (listed below)

- helmet: night vision
- chestplate: haste
- leggings: nothing unless combined with the boots for more speed
- boots: speed

amethyst tools - new tools that that are in between iron and diamond (in some cases netherite also) for most of their values

amethyst spear - a new weapon doing high damage but has a low attack speed (has a chance to stun enemies on hit)

quartz armor - new armor type similar to netherite but with a low durability 

quartz tools - new tools similar to netherite but with a low durability

blazing quartz sword - a varient of the quartz sword doing slightly more damage and having a faster attack speed (right click to shoot a fire beam)

many changes will come to this mod in the future
